title: Persuasive Writing Prompt — Should Students Have Longer Recess?
subject: literacy
raw_text:
Persuasive Writing

Topic: Should students have longer recess?

Write a persuasive paragraph that includes:
- A clear opinion statement
- At least 2 reasons to support your opinion
- A closing sentence

Remember to use persuasive words like: I believe, because, therefore, in my opinion.

Bonus: Write a second paragraph arguing the opposite side.
teacher_goal: Several students will need sentence starters. EAL students need a simpler prompt with vocabulary support. One small group should do this orally with the EA before writing.
